scripts.build: pnpm validate && pnpm build:graph && pnpm build:sqlite && pnpm build:web-data
scripts.build:website: pnpm build && pnpm prepare:website-data && cd website && vite build
scripts.check: cd website && svelte-kit sync && cd .. && tsc --noEmit
scripts.dev:website: pnpm build && pnpm prepare:website-data && cd website && vite dev --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.prepare:website-data: rm -rf website/static/data && mkdir -p website/static && cp -R generated/web website/static/data
